items.title: Long Easy Run
items.description: Run 10 km at an easy pace of 6:30-7:00 min/km. Focus on maintaining a heart rate in zone 2 (130-145 bpm).

items.title: Interval Training
items.description: After a 10-minute warm-up, perform 5x800m intervals at a pace of 5:15 min/km with 2 minutes of recovery jog between each interval. Cool down for 10 minutes.

items.title: Weight Training Session
items.description: Focus on full-body strength with 3 sets of 10-12 reps for each exercise: squats, deadlifts, bench press, and rows. Rest 60 seconds between sets.

items.title: Tempo Run
items.description: Run 6 km at a tempo pace of 5:45 min/km. Start with a 10-minute warm-up and finish with a 10-minute cool down. Aim to keep your heart rate in zone 3 (150-165 bpm).
